intro: MEDICATIONS and topical agents used in dermatology.
reading: Dermatology pharmacology commonly involves topical products: antibacterial ointments, steroid creams of varying potency, and scar treatments.

terms.example_en: Apply the scar cream twice daily.
terms.example_ru: Наносите крем для шрамов дважды в день.

terms.example_en: Bacitracin is an antibacterial ointment for minor wounds.
terms.example_ru: Бацитрацин — антибактериальная мазь для небольших ран.

terms.example_en: The doctor prescribed a lower potency steroid for the face.
terms.example_ru: Врач назначил стероид слабой потенции для лица.
